testcase.name: test_max_batch_size

failure.message: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'segment.analytics.request._session'; 'segment.analytics.request' is not a package

testcase.failure:
self = <analytics.test.test_consumer.TestConsumer testMethod=test_max_batch_size>
def test_max_batch_size(self): q = Queue() consumer = Consumer( q, 'testsecret', upload_size=100000, upload_interval=3) track = { 'type': 'track', 'event': 'python event', 'userId': 'userId' } msg_size = len(json.dumps(track).encode()) # number of messages in a maximum-size batch n_msgs = int(475000 / msg_size)
def mock_post_fn(_, data, **kwargs): res = mock.Mock() res.status_code = 200 self.assertTrue(len(data.encode()) < 500000, 'batch size (%d) exceeds 500KB limit' % len(data.encode())) return res
> with mock.patch('segment.analytics.request._session.post', side_effect=mock_post_fn) as mock_post:
